resources.string: A multilingual fork of Kreate, built with performance improvements, UI/UX refinement, and new features.
Automatically cache songs for offline playback with customizable cache limits. Download tracks for permanent access.
Enjoy a refined user experience with a beautiful interface, custom themes, and word-by-word synced lyrics.
Audio visualizer, sleep timer, advanced audio controls, and many more features.
Explore comprehensive artist profiles with top tracks, albums, and similar artists.
Share what you\'re listening to with your friends on Discord in real-time.
N-Zik is an evolving open-source project delivering frequent OTA updates and broad platform support including Android Auto.
